name: creative-juices
description: MCP server that generates random creative prompts and strategic questions to help LLMs think outside the box
long_description:
Creative Juices provides three tools for divergent and convergent thinking:

1. **get_inspiration** - Gentle creative nudges with everyday metaphors
2. **think_outside_the_box** - Intense creative shocks to break linear thinking
3. **reality_check** - Strategic validation using proven frameworks

Features 600+ curated words spanning human history, runs completely locally with no external dependencies.

tools.name: get_inspiration
tools.description: Generate 3 gentle verb-noun combinations for early-stage creative framing. Use at the start of creative or problem-solving tasks to frame challenges in unexpected ways.

tools.name: think_outside_the_box
tools.description: Generate 3 intense verb-noun combinations for breaking linear thinking. Use mid-conversation when exploration has stalled or thinking has become too linear.

tools.name: reality_check
tools.description: Get strategic questions from proven thinking frameworks for validation. Use to ground creative thinking in reality while maintaining openness.
